Channel clear. Tower has hold all crossings in effect. Both departures remain at HS_31C, awaiting Tower's takeoff clearance. All ground control operations are complete—the runway and further coordination are now Tower's responsibility.
Both departures holding at HS_31C. I'll continue monitoring the frequency.
Both still holding. I'll continue monitoring.
Both still holding at HS_31C. I'll continue monitoring the frequency for any changes or new traffic.
Still holding. I'll continue monitoring.
Still holding. Both departures positioned correctly. I'll continue monitoring the frequency.
Still holding. Continuing to monitor.
Still holding. I'll continue monitoring.
31R is now hot (departure traffic on the runway). Both departures remain at HS_31C. I'll continue monitoring.
31R still hot. Continuing to monitor.
31R still hot. I'll continue monitoring.
31R still hot. Continuing to monitor.
31R still hot. I'll continue monitoring.

frequency.text: Ground, Tower, runway three one right traffic complete, crossings at your discretion.

output.text: Tower has released crossings—31R is now clear. The channel is busy with Tower's transmission. Both departures remain at HS_31C. I'll wait for the channel to clear.
Channel clear. 31R is now cold, crossings at my discretion. Both departures remain at HS_31C, ready for Tower's takeoff clearance. All ground control work is complete—Tower now manages the runway.
